stub: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background.
personalization: She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership.
substantive: She opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration.
justification: In political debates, she regularly uses arguments that appeal to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background).
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said:  “Elections are important because they force me as a politician to listen and respond to the views of voters.”
text: She is a Labour MP who comes from a white middle class background. She is from your constituency. She rarely speaks out and votes against her party leadership. She opposes adopting more stringent measures to limit immigration. In political debates, she regularly uses arguments that appeal to people like you (e.g. of your class and educational background). Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said:  “Elections are important because they force me as a politician to listen and respond to the views of voters.”
